cells.rationale: Contract-shaped resume envelope with subtle correctness invariants (lane-aware hash staleness keying, first-invalid-downstream invalidation, chained selection-verdict hashing) whose misgrading silently re-spawns or wrongly trusts stale artifacts — a nameable correctness-invariant opus gate at xhigh for new-pattern contract work.
